nation: Lac des Mille Lacs First Nation
economic_notes: First Nation has investments in Dallan Holdings LP and Dallan Fort William LP (sawmill yard maintenance and equipment rentals). Also invested $1,835,000 in Lot 251-3 Development LP. COVID-19 noted as significant event. ISC funding represented 28% of recurring revenue (down from 41% in 2019). Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership distributions received based on 1.7% of provincial gross gaming revenues.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2020. Consolidated entity includes 1913563 Ontario Inc., Nezaadiikaang General Contracting GP Inc., and Nezaadiikaang Economic Development LP as fully consolidated subsidiaries. Two government business partnerships (Dallan Holdings LP and Dallan Fort William LP) accounted for under modified equity method. $1,835,000 invested in Lot 251-3 Development LP via Nezaadiikaang Economic Development LP. Flood Settlement member distributions of $1,120,000 included in accounts payable. COVID-19 noted as significant event causing late filing. No schedule of remuneration included. Membership Distributions segment ($765,450) classified under expenses_social. Capital segment ($403,081) classified under expenses_infrastructure. Loss on disposal of capital assets $20,774 included as other expense. No salary/remuneration schedule provided.
